items.title: Here’s How Markets Closed After the Supreme Court Heard Tariff Arguments
items.description: U.S. indexes finished higher Wednesday afternoon, with a rebound in AI stocks helping lift the Nasdaq composite 0.6%.   Strong earnings and optimism from U.S. companies also spurred gains, with a rally in Amgen and Caterpillar shares lifting the Dow.

items.title: Nvidia, Apple Were Not Among October's Top 3 Dow Stocks
items.description: Dow stocks overall rose 2.5% in October. It was the index's best month since August and extended a win streak to six straight months.

items.title: Chart Master: One buy and one sell
items.description: Carter Worth, Worth Charting, talks what stocks he is looking to buy and what stock he is looking to sell between Roku and Caterpillar based on technical indicators.

items.title: U.S. Markets Stabilize After Tech Rout
items.description: U.S. Markets Stabilize After Tech Rout

items.title: Caterpillar Stock Is Up. Why Wall Street Is More Optimistic.
items.description: Wall Street appears to be feeling better about Caterpillar stock after the heavy machinery maker’s event for analysts and investors.  The event, held in in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday, included a tour of  Caterpillar’s  Solar Turbines facility, which manufactures industrial, natural-gas-powered turbines for power generation applications.  Along with product demonstration, Caterpillar management provided 2030 financial targets.
